markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the Brex \<\> GrowthX engagement to align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Achieve 60%+ YoY organic/direct revenue growth by expanding Jon Kowieski's capacity and building a repeatable, data-driven system to prove marketing credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)
  - [**Priority:** Focus on Corporate Cards and Business Banking, where Brex is a strong competitor to Ramp. Expense Management is a key opportunity, with a single article rewrite expected to significantly improve rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Target commercial businesses (51–250 employees) via a "rip and replace" model. A recent underwriting change (min. revenue lowered from $5M to $1M) expands the TAM to include new industries like construction and med spas.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will analyze anonymized sales call transcripts (Gong) and a recent NerdWallet survey to distill customer pain points and competitive advantages.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2803.0)

## Topics

### Business Context & Goals

  - [**Primary Goal:** Achieve 60%+ YoY organic/direct revenue growth.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)
  - [**Secondary Goal:** Build a repeatable marketing system to prove credibility and articulate strategy to leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3254.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Jon Kowieski, the sole organic content creator, needs capacity to focus on higher-level strategy (e.g., GEO shifts, website experimentation).](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Solution:** A hybrid internal/external team provides bandwidth and external validation.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Market Strategy & Priorities

  - [**Top Competitor:** Ramp, primarily in the Corporate Card space.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Product Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Corporate Cards:** A mature product with strong rankings, competing directly with Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [**Business Banking:** A newer product (launched Feb '25) with high-intent keyword wins (e.g., "startup banking").](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
          - [**Key Pitch:** No hidden fees, same-hour liquidity, high interest rates, no card minimums.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
          - [**Constraint:** Cannot be called a "bank account" (must be "banking account").](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
          - [**Barrier:** A $50k minimum cash requirement is higher than some competitors' ($25k).](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
      - [**Expense Management:** A key opportunity. A single article rewrite is expected to significantly improve rankings from its current \~12th position.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Target Audience & Triggers

  - [**Core Target:** "Rip and replace" customers in the commercial market (51–250 employees).](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**Recent TAM Expansion:** Underwriting minimum revenue lowered from $5M to $1M.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This opens new verticals like construction, med spas, and multi-location businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [**Key Triggers for Consideration:**](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)
      - [New funding rounds](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
      - [New finance hires](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
      - [EU expansion (a key Brex advantage over Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
      - [Hiring more employees](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2611.0)

### Content & Technical Workflow

  - [**Current Process:** Jon Kowieski creates content → content marketer edits → Jon reviews → publish.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3445.0)
  - [**CMS:** Sanity. GrowthX has an existing integration for potential automation.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3485.0)
  - [**Publishing:** Engineering approves and merges changes via a Slack channel, enabling a fast pace.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon Kowieski:**](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2803.0)
      - [Provide anonymized sales call transcripts (Gong) for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2803.0)
      - [Share the recent NerdWallet survey results.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
      - [Schedule a deep-dive session on the current Sanity publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=3404.0)
  - [**Alex Rudyak:**](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
      - [Connect GrowthX with the segment marketing team for a deep-dive.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
      - [Schedule a separate session with Alex Rudyak to discuss the verticalization strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BjLutGaHiuVc11WycmGzU3pk2qqtzk-Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
